title: Freedom of Information Requests - FEDERAL RESERVE BANK of NEW YORK
gist: This is a NY Fed legal/governance page describing how to file information requests under its Transparency and Accountability Policy. It contains no economic or market analysis; the only mildly notable point is that the NY Fed asserts it is not a federal agency and therefore not subject to FOIA.

insights.claim: The NY Fed states it is not an agency and is therefore not subject to the Freedom of Information Act, instead complying voluntarily via its Transparency and Accountability Policy adopted in January 2024.
insights.speaker: NY Fed
insights.so_what: Marginal governance note for those tracking Fed transparency/legal status; no market signal.
insights.quote: The New York Fed is not an agency and is therefore not subject to the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA).
